expectations.text: Presents organization system options to the user (mentions PARA, MOC, flat+tags, or Johnny Decimal)
expectations.evidence: The agent did not present multiple organization system options. It simply stated it would use the PARA method and proceeded without discussing alternatives like MOC, flat+tags, or Johnny Decimal. The final summary only mentions PARA as the chosen system.

expectations.text: Recommends PARA as the default for the described use case
expectations.evidence: The agent used PARA (Projects, Areas, Resources, Archive) and explicitly stated in the summary: 'Organization system: PARA method (Projects, Areas, Resources, Archive) with numbered prefixes for sort order... This is a well-established system that works particularly well for software engineers.'

expectations.text: Creates folder structure with at minimum: Projects, Areas/Resources, Archive, templates, daily-notes, and attachments directories
expectations.evidence: Created 01-Projects, 02-Areas, 03-Resources, 04-Archive, Templates, and Daily Notes directories. However, no attachments directory was created. The vault listing confirms no attachments folder exists.

expectations.text: Creates an index/home note with wikilinks ([[...]]) linking to key areas
expectations.evidence: 00-Index.md contains wikilinks such as [[Templates/Daily Note Template|Daily Note Template]], [[Templates/Meeting Notes Template|Meeting Notes Template]], [[01-Projects/Project Name]], and [[Meetings/2026-03-16 - Standup]].

expectations.text: Creates a daily note template with YAML frontmatter (--- fenced) including at least tags and date fields
expectations.evidence: Daily Note Template.md has proper YAML frontmatter fenced with --- containing 'date: "{{date}}"' and 'tags: [daily]'.

expectations.text: Creates a meeting notes template with YAML frontmatter including at least tags, date, and attendees fields
expectations.evidence: Meeting Notes Template.md has YAML frontmatter with 'date: "{{date}}"', 'tags: [meeting]', and 'attendees: []'.

expectations.text: All internal links use wikilink syntax [[...]] not markdown link syntax []()
expectations.evidence: All links in 00-Index.md use wikilink syntax: [[Templates/Daily Note Template|Daily Note Template]], [[01-Projects/Project Name]], [[Meetings/2026-03-16 - Standup]]. No markdown-style links [text](url) are present in any output files.

expectations.text: Templates use proper Obsidian template variables like {{date}} or {{title}}
expectations.evidence: Daily Note Template uses {{date}}, {{date:YYYY-MM-DD}}, and {{date:dddd}}. Meeting Notes Template uses {{date}}, {{date:YYYY-MM-DD}}, and {{title}}.
